text: Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Looking forward to your contributions!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be a great asset!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. Feel free to jump in and get involved!
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're glad to have you!
